local_validation.notes: The new BMF-grammar.bml body proof passes at 1048575 across Go/Rust/TypeScript kernels. Adjacent companion, method dispatch, and class inheritance proofs remain green.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The original companion BMF-grammar.bml no longer parses only as an empty class shell. Its BMF class body now produces native BML model components for the string const, class/public fields, constructor, Main(String[] hArgs), and method signatures.
test_flows: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-bmf-grammar-body-source-proof.fk

phase_gate.reason: BMF-grammar.bml now forms native class-body model components, but full grammar-body semantic lowering, ParseStack/Context runtime APIs, rich statement/expression lowering, and complete source-to-native execution remain open parity gaps.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-bmf-grammar-body-source-proof.fk parses original BMF-grammar.bml and proves non-empty BMF class body model components.
form/form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk enables direct body parsing for BMF and adds class-body const preservation.
docs/system_audit/bml_thesis_feature_audit_20260601.md records the BMF-grammar.bml body proof while keeping full grammar-body semantic lowering as a gap.
